prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the family photo into a handcrafted layered paper-cut illustration. Preserve the same family pose, clothing, proportions, central placement, garden walkway, and repeating leafy arch composition, but convert everything into tactile cut-paper shapes with visible paper fibers, soft shadows between layers, rounded edges, and a nostalgic handmade scrapbook feel. Simplify the foliage into stacked green paper leaves and the yellow arch blossoms into small cut-paper flowers. Add whimsical paper-craft details that were not in the photo: 2 small birds, one yellow bird on the left side of the arch and one blue bird on the upper right; 2 butterflies, one pink near the right side of the family and one purple near the lower left; and colorful oversized foreground paper flowers along both lower edges. Keep the overall portrait orientation, warm natural palette, and cheerful family-photo mood. Style intensity: highly layered handcrafted paper-cut art. Background mood: whimsical nostalgic garden.
